children.text: any franchise in effect on the effective date of this subchapter, including any such provisions which relate to the designation, use, or support for the use of channel capacity for public, educational, or governmental use, and

any law of any State (as defined in ) in effect on , or any regulation promulgated pursuant to such law, which relates to such designation, use or support of such channel capacity,section 153 of this titleOctober 30, 1984

children.label: b
children.text: For purposes of subsection (a) and other provisions of this subchapter, a franchise shall be considered in effect on the effective date of this subchapter if such franchise was granted on or before such effective date.
